summary: Completed frontend testing of LedgerAI Reports tab functionality. Successfully tested 3 view options (Overview, Expense Deep Dive, Vendor Analysis) with visual charts and data display. However, critical drill-down modal functionality is not working despite UI indicators suggesting interactivity.

critical_bugs.issue: Drill-down modals not opening when clicking on chart elements (pie slices, bar charts, vendor rows)
critical_bugs.impact: Users cannot access detailed transaction data despite UI indicating clickability

ui_bugs.issue: Charts display 'Click a slice to drill down' and 'Click on a bar to see transactions' text but clicks don't trigger modals

integration_issues.issue: Event handlers for chart elements (pie slices, bars, vendor rows) not properly bound or implemented

passed_tests: Reports tab loads with correct title 'Reports & Analytics'
3 view options (Overview, Expense Deep Dive, Vendor Analysis) are present and clickable
Overview view displays P&L summary with correct calculations
Personal Drawings section shows proper breakdown
Monthly Expense Trend bar chart renders with data
Expense Deep Dive shows pie charts for Categories and Activities
Expense by Payment Method breakdown displays correctly
Vendor Analysis shows Top Vendors pie chart
All Vendors list displays with transaction counts
Top 10 Vendors bar chart renders properly
Data injection via localStorage works correctly
Visual design and styling are professional
Navigation between tab views functions smoothly

success_percentage.frontend: 70% - Core UI and data display working, but interactive features failing

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Implement drill-down modal functionality. Chart elements display click instructions but event handlers are missing. Need to: 1) Add click event handlers to pie chart slices, bar chart elements, and vendor rows 2) Implement DrillDownModal component to show transaction details 3) Add sort functionality (Date, Amount, Vendor) within modals 4) Ensure modal opens/closes properly with transaction data filtering
